ema_smoothed_rho.effect: Reduces step-to-step noise in rho_t. Both v1 and v2 have very low variance on first conv layer (hitting clip bounds), but EMA ensures smoother transitions in interior layers.

floor_clipping.effect: Prevents WD collapse to zero. Min effective WD observed = 1.00e-05 (exactly at floor). This is the primary fix for the Kp_only/PD_control zero-budget bug.

epoch_budget_assertion.effect: end_epoch_check() returns epoch WD budget and warns if zero. Cumulative budget tracking enables system monitor to detect WD collapse early.
